name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with no Remote Access
notes: Edit this BB to include any geographic location that typically would not be allowed remote access to the enterprise. Once configured, you can enable the Anomaly: Remote Access from Foreign Country/Region rule.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with no Remote Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source is located in Africa, Antarctic, Asia, CentralAmerica, Europe, Oceania, SouthAmerica, misc, Europe, Asia
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with no Remote Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source is located in Africa,    Antarctic,    Asia,    CentralAmerica,    Europe,    Oceania,    SouthAmerica,    misc,  Europe, Asia
